No LiquidationNotified event appeared in the liquidation tx itself, which matches the known 3-arg/4-arg ABI mismatch documented in liveV2Smoke.ts and the current contracts; the assertion explicitly allows XCM capability to be proven by the separate direct notifier call in the same test script.

The latest V2 lifecycle evidence is now complete. Deposit tx 0x694e7c6c54d7c8684aa0a46ae21b85450a1b09a6d596912b20ee27715242b852 succeeded with status=1 to LendingRouterV2 (0x08aace96441Cb320BC68b072D110169fbf38eb08), called depositCollateralFromPAS with value=4000000000000000000, and emitted LendingCoreV2 CollateralDeposited(account=0x222a2a8a203b4146f6036F1E08e86C9B85063b70, amount=4000000000000000000). A live quoteEngine() read from RiskAdapterV2 returns 0xC6907B609ba4b94C9e319570BaA35DaF587252f8, matching the manifest's PVM DeterministicRiskModel address 0xC6907B609ba4b94C9e319570BaA35DaF587252f8. Liquidation tx 0x6abcbb2ea76f3bbe921920f3d29366e8156efe531d99b68c616567ff29feb4fd then succeeded with status=1 and emitted Liquidated(borrower=0x36a83a4450744f4F9988c9Bc46cC556Ba5bFD2dF, liquidator=0xda4C6cf28cD09118f51FA326187CDe2b331CC527, repaid=276001026650684931506, collateralSeized=5796021559664383561). Together these receipts now prove the V2 deposit→borrow→repay→liquidate lifecycle, with live cross-VM verification on the borrow path; the script intentionally uses a separate admin borrower address for the liquidation segment, as documented in liveV2Smoke.ts.

frictions: Used the documented fallback RPC https://services.polkadothub-rpc.com/testnet/ for sparse live reads because the guidance notes prior primary/explorer 403s from this environment.

Explicit eth_call block-tag reads for currentDebt on blocks 6560561-6560563 all returned the same pre-liquidation debt on the fallback RPC, so final proof used receipt/event evidence plus latest currentDebt=0 instead of relying on historical state reads.

liveV2Smoke.ts splits the proof across two positions: borrower 0x222a2a8a203b4146f6036F1E08e86C9B85063b70 for deposit/borrow/repay and borrower 0x36a83a4450744f4F9988c9Bc46cC556Ba5bFD2dF for the dedicated liquidation segment, so the script source had to be cross-checked to interpret the tx sequence correctly.
